scripts.deploy: powershell -Command "$changes = $(git status --porcelain); if ($changes) { git add .; git commit -m 'website updates'; git push; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .\public; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .\resources\_gen; Remove-Item -Force .\.hugo_build.lock; hugo --gc --minify; netlify deploy --prod --dir=public } else { Write-Output 'No changes to commit. Production deploy skipped.' }"
scripts.deploy-draft: powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .\public; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .\resources\_gen; Remove-Item -Force .\.hugo_build.lock; git add .; try { git commit -m 'website updates' } catch {}; git push; hugo --gc --minify; netlify deploy --dir=public"
